root.name: Task Completion: Crop the architectural diagram image on slide 8 to show only the top two rows of buildings
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully cropped the architectural diagram image on slide 8 to display only the top two rows of buildings, without introducing extraneous changes.

children.name: Correct Cropping of Architectural Diagram
children.description: Checks that the image on slide 8 was cropped to show only the top two rows of buildings.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Ensures no unintended edits were made to slides other than slide 8.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Slide 8 (Other Than Cropping)
children.description: Ensures no unintended edits (e.g., text, layout, animations) were made to slide 8 apart from cropping the image.

children.name: No Unintended Text/Shape/Layout Changes
children.description: Checks that text, shapes, or layout on slide 8 remain unchanged apart from the cropped image.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    from pptx import Presentation
    slide_num = 8
    orig_prs = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    mod_prs = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    orig_slide = orig_prs.slides[slide_num-1]
    mod_slide = mod_prs.slides[slide_num-1]
    # Compare text on both slides
    orig_text = " ".join([shp.text for shp in orig_slide.shapes if hasattr(shp, 'text')])
    mod_text = " ".join([shp.text for shp in mod_slide.shapes if hasattr(shp, 'text')])
    # Allow for small differences due to possible cropping
    if orig_text.strip() != mod_text.strip():
        return "Text on slide 8 was changed.", 0.0
    # Compare count of shapes (excluding pictures)
    orig_shapes = [shp for shp in orig_slide.shapes if shp.shape_type != 13]
    mod_shapes = [shp for shp in mod_slide.shapes if shp.shape_type != 13]
    if len(orig_shapes) != len(mod_shapes):
        return "Non-picture shapes count differs on slide 8.", 0.0
    # Compare layout type
    orig_layout = orig_slide.slide_layout.name
    mod_layout = mod_slide.slide_layout.name
    if orig_layout != mod_layout:
        return "Slide 8 layout type changed.", 0.0
    return "No unintended text/shape/layout changes on slide 8.", 1.0

children.name: No Unintended Animation/Transition Changes to Slide 8
children.description: Checks that no animation or transition changes were made to slide 8.

metadata.task: Crop the architectural diagram image on slide 8 to show only the top two rows of buildings.
